title: Three Column Card Layout
description: Create a grid container that displays 6 cards in 3 equal-width columns with a 20px gap between them. Use the `repeat()` function and the `fr` unit.

starterCode.html:
Card 1
Card 2
Card 3
Card 4
Card 5
Card 6

hint: Use `repeat(3, 1fr)` for 3 equal columns. Each `1fr` takes one third of the remaining space.

title: Responsive Blog Layout with Spanning
description: Build a responsive blog listing showing 5 articles. On desktop, create 3 columns where the first article spans all 3 columns (like a featured post), the next 2 articles span 2 columns and 1 column respectively, and the last 2 articles each span 1 column. Use `grid-column` for spanning.

starterCode.html:
Featured Post (full width)
Wide Post (span 2)
Regular Post
Regular Post
Regular Post

hint: Use `grid-column: 1 / -1` for full-width spanning (all lines). Use `grid-column: span 2` to span 2 columns from the item's auto-placed position.

title: Auto-Responsive Dashboard Grid
description: Create a dashboard widget grid that uses `auto-fit` and `minmax()` to display 8 widgets. Each widget should be at least 250px wide but stretch to fill available space. Additionally, make the first widget (the main chart) span 2 columns when enough space allows. Use ONLY grid properties — no media queries allowed for the responsive behavior.

starterCode.html:
Main Chart
Stats
Activity
Messages
Tasks
Analytics
Settings
Calendar

hint: 1. Use `repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr))` for responsive columns. 2. For the chart widget, use `grid-column: span 2`. Since it's the first item, it will span 2 columns in the auto-placement. 3. The grid will automatically adjust from 1 column (mobile) to 4+ columns (desktop) without any media queries.
